items.title: Why Venezuela’s Second Earthquake Was So Damaging to Buildings
items.summary: Factors like the short interval between the two powerful quakes and different types of soil led to some structures collapsing while others stayed standing.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
